generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Horizontal displacement encoder measuring hoist swing angle."
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance AnemometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed experienced by the crane."
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder providing position feedback for the cart motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder providing position feedback for the hoist motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino temperature sensor monitoring the controller board temperature."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ArduinoTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoStatusSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino status sensor reporting controller health status."
    DTDFVocab:producedData ArduinoStatusDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Data transmitted over MQTT
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AnemometerSensor
]

instance CartPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CartEncoder
]

instance HoistPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HoistEncoder
]

instance ArduinoTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoTemperatureSensor
]

instance ArduinoStatusDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoStatusSensor
]

instance SimulatedTrajectoryDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

// C10: Data objects
instance SwingAngleTelemetry : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured swing angle telemetry collected from the swing angle encoder."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase, GTLibPythonLibrary
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance WindSpeedTelemetry : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured wind speed telemetry collected from the anemometer."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase, GTLibPythonLibrary
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CartPositionTelemetry : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured cart position telemetry collected from the cart encoder."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase, GTLibPythonLibrary
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance HoistPositionTelemetry : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured hoist position telemetry collected from the hoist encoder."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase, GTLibPythonLibrary
    DTDFVocab:fromData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoTemperatureTelemetry : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured Arduino board temperature telemetry."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase
    DTDFVocab:fromData ArduinoTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoStatusTelemetry : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured Arduino controller status telemetry."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBDatabase
    DTDFVocab:fromData ArduinoStatusDataTransmitted
]

instance SimulatedTrajectory : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated trajectory produced by the physics simulation service."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GTLibPythonLibrary
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulatedTrajectoryDataTransmitted
]

instance DistanceMetricResult : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Computed distance metric between measured and simulated trajectories."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GTLibPythonLibrary
]

// C10: Models
instance CADGeometryModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3‑D CAD geometry of the crane in Autodesk Fusion 360."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GTLibPythonLibrary
]

instance KinematicTransformationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic transformation matrices linking cart and hoist states."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GTLibPythonLibrary
]

instance OptimalControlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Optimal control model used by the trajectory generator for zero‑swing motion."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GTLibPythonLibrary
]

instance PhysicsSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics‑based simulation model reproducing cart and hoist dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GTLibPythonLibrary
]

instance ValidationMetricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Distance metric model used by the continuous validation service."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GTLibPythonLibrary
]

instance WindSpeedSensorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Sensor model describing wind‑speed measurement characteristics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GTLibPythonLibrary
]

instance SwingAngleSensorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Sensor model describing swing‑angle encoder measurement characteristics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GTLibPythonLibrary
]

// C11: Enablers
instance GTLibPythonLibrary : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python package 'gantrylib' providing core crane control functionality."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, CraneSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, LoggingService
]

instance MQTTBrokerMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker orchestrating inter‑container communication."
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, CraneSimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, LoggingService, GrafanaVisualizationService, OperatorInterfaceService
]

instance TimescaleDBDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB time‑series database for logging telemetry data."
    DTDFVocab:enables LoggingService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard for real‑time visualization of telemetry."
    DTDFVocab:enables GrafanaVisualizationService
]

instance PythonGUIFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python GUI framework enabling the human‑machine interface."
    DTDFVocab:enables OperatorInterfaceService
]

// C6: Services
instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating optimal zero‑swing trajectories based on wind speed and kinematic constraints."
    DTDFVocab:provides GenerateTrajectoryAction, OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance CraneSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service simulating cart and hoist dynamics using the physics simulation model."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationOutputInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service continuously validating measured versus simulated trajectories and triggering alerts."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationResultInsight, TriggerAlertAction
]

instance LoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service logging telemetry data into TimescaleDB."
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance GrafanaVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service displaying real‑time telemetry in Grafana dashboards."
    DTDFVocab:provides DisplayDashboardAction
]

instance OperatorInterfaceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Python GUI – operator interface for configuration, control, and monitoring."
    DTDFVocab:provides ConfigureParameterAction, OperatorControlInsight
]

// C17: Insights / Actions
instance GenerateTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to generate trajectory set‑points for cart and hoist motors."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into feasibility and optimality of the generated trajectory."
]

instance SimulationOutputInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight reporting the simulated trajectory and system dynamics."
]

instance ValidationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing the distance metric result between measured and simulated trajectories."
]

instance TriggerAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action to trigger an alert when validation thresholds are exceeded."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight summarising historical telemetry stored in TimescaleDB."
]

instance DisplayDashboardAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to update the Grafana dashboard with the latest telemetry."
]

instance ConfigureParameterAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual action to configure crane parameters such as trajectory horizon and wind‑speed limits."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance OperatorControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight reflecting current operator control status and actions."
]

// C2: Acting Components (Physical actuation)
instance PhysicalCraneMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical cart and hoist motors controlled via the Arduino and Trinamic TMC4671 motor drivers."
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical actuator interface packaging kinase setpoints and transmitting them over MQTT."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Trajectory Generator Service produces optimized motion profiles which are sent via MQTT to the Control Application. The Control Application translates these into motor commands, relays them to the Arduino, and the Arduino drives the motor drivers. Alerts from the Continuous Validation Service are also routed to the HMI for operator action."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time control and logging occur at sub‑second intervals (≈10–100 ms). Trajectory planning operates on a slower timescale (seconds) to generate a full movement profile. Continuous validation runs concurrently with execution, evaluating data at the same sample rate as logging."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Five physical containers (Crane, Crane Interface, Control App, Logging App, HMI) and six digital twin containers (Database, Dashboard, Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Continuous Validation, MQTT Broker), all connected via Docker networking, with the MQTT broker acting as the central pub/sub hub and the database as the persistent telemetry store."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design‑time: CAD modelling and kinematic model creation.
Build‑time: Assembly of physical components and firmware upload to Arduino.
Commissioning: Initial connection, calibration of sensors, first trajectory tests.
Operational: Continuous validation, fault detection, logging, and user‑controlled motion.
Maintenance: Update of models, retraining of fault classifiers, firmware upgrades."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Simulation model verified against measured position and swing data; continuous‑validation computes Euclidean distance between measured and simulated trajectories and compares against a configurable threshold (e.g., 5 cm). Confidence bounds (upper/lower limits) shown in Grafana. Re‑validation loops ensure model fidelity over time. Detection of residual swing validates kinematic model and motor controller tuning."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical interface connects to Arduino via USB over UART; motor drivers and sensors plug into Arduino. Container services communicate over MQTT (TCP port 1883) and SQL (PGSQL port 5432) on Docker bridge network. All services run locally on a personal PC.

"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Local deployment on a Linux or Windows personal computer with Docker Desktop; all services containerized; database and broker auto‑initialised via docker‑compose. The repository hosts Dockerfiles and a `docker-compose.yml` for one‑click startup. No cloud hosting described."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "No explicit integration with external information systems or other digital twins is described in the provided documents.

"
]
